name: mako-ai
description: Local-first repo intelligence engine for AI coding agents.

scripts.build: tsc -b tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm --filter agentmako run build && corepack pnpm --filter @mako-ai/web run build
scripts.build:force: tsc -b tsconfig.json --force && corepack pnpm --filter agentmako run build && corepack pnpm --filter @mako-ai/web run build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b tsconfig.json --pretty false && tsc --noEmit -p test/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.supabase:reset: corepack pnpm exec supabase db reset --yes
scripts.supabase:status: corepack pnpm exec supabase status -o env
